problem id: 7669569d
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(4) OR SHL(7)

examples:
  10011110 -> 11101001
  10000110 -> 01101000
  01001011 -> 10110100
  01011001 -> 10010101
  10001010 -> 10101000
  01011101 -> 11010101
  11110100 -> 01001111
  00000001 -> 10010000
  10111000 -> 10001011

query: 00100110
predicted answer: 01100010
